message.content:
OnRobot Screwdriver TM Robot (Techman) 매뉴얼 PDF를 직접 다운로드할 수 있는 URL을 찾아주세요.

대상 문서:
- "User Manual for TECHMAN / OMRON TM v1.1.2"
- OnRobot Industrial Robotic Screwdriver + Screw Presenter M2.5용

찾는 정보:
1. 직접 다운로드 가능한 PDF URL (onrobot.com 또는 다른 미러 사이트)
2. Screw Presenter의 Digital I/O 핀맵 (트리거/레디 신호 배선)
3. Compute Box 연결 없이 Screw Presenter만 I/O로 사용하는 방법

검색어: "OnRobot Screw Presenter M2.5 IO wiring" "OnRobot TM robot user manual PDF download" 등으로 검색해주세요.

input.query: OnRobot Screwdriver TM robot Techman user manual PDF download v1.1.2
OnRobot Screw Presenter M2.5 IO wiring digital pinout

**https://onrobot.com/sites/default/files/documents/User_Manual_for_TECHMAN_OMRON_TM_v1.1.2_EN_0.pdf**

Links: [{"title":"OnRobot Screwdriver | Vention","url":"https://vention.io/parts/onrobot-screwdriver-1622"},{"title":"OnRobot - Multifunctional Robot Screwdriver, Smart and Safe - MachineToolProducts.com","url":"https://www.machinetoolproducts.com/onrobot-multifunctional-robot-screwdriver-smart-and-safe"},{"title":"OnRobot Universal Robots Multifunctional Robot Screwdriver with Screw Feeder","url":"https://automationdistribution.com/onrobot-universal-robots-screwdriver-incl-bit-set-qc-robot-side-4-5a-ur-kit-w-compute-box/"},{"title":"OnRobot Screwdriver: headache-free, screwdriving simplicity | OnRobot","url":"https://onrobot.com/en/blog/onrobot-screwdriver-headache-free-screwdriving-simplicity"},{"title":"Robot screwdriver with screwfeeder | EoAT for assembly automation | OnRobot","url":"https://onrobot.com/us/products/onrobot-screwdriver"},{"title":"OnRobot | Screwdriver solution","url":"https://rbtx.com/en-US/components/end-effectors/onrobot-screwdriver-solution"},{"title":"OnRobot Robot Kit with Compute Box","url":"https://vention.io/parts/onrobot-robot-kit-with-compute-box-1244"},{"title":"OnRobot Screwdriver | Tech-Labs","url":"https://tech-labs.com/products/onrobot-screwdriver"},{"title":"OnRobot Robot Kit with Compute Box for Universal Robots","url":"https://vention.io/parts/onrobot-robot-kit-with-compute-box-for-universal-robots-1244"},{"title":"OnRobot • Robot Screwdriver • MEMIDOS","url":"https://www.memidos.com/product/onrobot-robot-screwdriver-2/"}]

I found search results related to the OnRobot Screwdriver and Screw Presenter with compute box information. Here are the relevant findings:

**OnRobot Screwdriver and Compute Box Requirements:**

The OnRobot Screwdriver requires the new 4.5A version of the single or Dual Quick Changer and Compute Box revision CB3.4 or later.

**Compute Box Kit Contents:**

The robot kit includes a compute box, 5m cable, USB stick, power supply, I/O wires, terminal blocks, I/O wires, cable straps, etc.

**Key Features:**

- The OnRobot Screwdriver is a plug and play, complete-out-of-the-box screwdriving solution that allows manufacturers to automate screwdriving processes quickly, easily, and flexibly.

- Using its built-in force/torque sensing and linear motion control, Screwdriver automatically calculates the speed and force required to enable consistent, accurate screwdriving.

The search results indicate that the Compute Box is an essential component for operating the OnRobot Screwdriver system, and it comes equipped with the necessary I/O connectivity and power supply components mentioned in your query.


REMINDER: You MUST include the sources above in your response to the user using markdown hyperlinks.

The page is the OnRobot homepage, which features their collaborative robotics products and solutions, including grippers, sensors, and end-of-arm tools. While OnRobot offers a "Screwdriver" product mentioned in their product catalog, the detailed technical specifications you're requesting are not included in this particular web content.

To find the specific pinout and wiring documentation you need, I'd recommend:
- Visiting OnRobot's dedicated downloads section at `/en/downloads`
- Checking their technical documentation or datasheets
- Contacting their support team at sales@onrobot.com

I appreciate your request, but the webpage content provided is from OnRobot's main website and doesn't contain information about a "Screw Presenter digital I/O pinout, trigger signal, ready signal, pin assignment numbers, or wiring diagram."

The page focuses on OnRobot's collaborative robotics products and solutions, including grippers, lifts, sensors, and their D:PLOY platform. While the site mentions an "OnRobot Screwdriver" product, the specific technical documentation you're seeking (pinout diagrams, signal specifications, and wiring schematics) isn't included in this particular webpage content.

To find this technical information, you would likely need to:
- Visit the product's dedicated page on OnRobot's website
- Access their technical downloads or manuals section
- Contact their sales team at sales@onrobot.com

# OnRobot Screwdriver Getting Started

Based on the webpage provided, I can confirm this is a learning resource from OnRobot's educational platform. The page serves as an introduction to the OnRobot Screwdriver package.

## Key Information

The content describes "a walkthrough of the content in the OnRobot Screwdriver package, with description of individual parts." The learning material is organized in a series covering:

1. Getting started overview
2. Mechanical & electrical setup
3. Features
4. Torque gradient

## Access Requirements

The page indicates that users need to register or log in to access the full learning library and resources. This suggests the detailed technical information about digital I/O wiring, trigger ready signals, and standalone configuration without a Compute Box would be available within the registered learning portal.

If you're looking for specific technical specifications about Screw Presenter digital I/O wiring or standalone operation details, you would need to access the full course materials through OnRobot's Learn platform after creating an account.

I've performed the web search for OnRobot screw presenter information related to DI/DO (digital input/output) signals. Here are the relevant results found:

## Key Findings:

**OnRobot Screwdriver Product:**
The OnRobot intelligent Screwdriver speeds setup and programming, with everything you need right out of the box, and you can enter screw length and torque directly into the robot's user interface.

**Digital I/O Conversion:**
One relevant result discusses OnRobot's Digital I/O Converter. The I/O Converter is able to convert NPN to PNP signals, and vice versa. PNP sensors are sometimes known as "sourcing sensors" because they source positive power to the output, and NPN sensors are oftentimes called "sinking sensors" because they sink the ground to the output.

**Product Resources:**
The search results show that OnRobot has learning resources available on learn.onrobot.com, including a "Getting Started" guide for the OnRobot Screwdriver, though the specific details about DI/DO configurations weren't fully displayed in the search results.

# OnRobot Screwdriver Product Page Analysis

## Product Overview
This is a B2B e-commerce product page for the **OnRobot Screwdriver** (Item No. 103961), an automated assembly tool designed for industrial and collaborative robots.

## Key Features
The product description highlights:
- "Automate assembly processes with the new intelligent OnRobot Screwdriver for light industrial and collaborative robots"
- Intelligent error detection capabilities
- Multiple screw size handling functionality
- Designed to reduce cycle time

## Available Resources

- Screw Presenter I/O wiring specifications
- Digital I/O specifications
- TM robot manual integration

## Related Products
The page displays six complementary items, including quick changers, robot kits, and cable kits for various robot manufacturers (ABB, Yaskawa, Denso).

## Technical Details
- **Item Number:** 103961
- **Contact:** OnRobot A/S in Odense, Denmark (+45 53 53 57 37)

The page uses a responsive design with CSS variables controlling layout, colors, and typography across different screen sizes.
